description: Negative/error-path: reconnect with very old lastSeenServerSeq returns result.type==="snapshot" with current snapshots. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32601.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: reconnect.replay.edge.gap-exceeds-buffer-snapshot. When lastSeenServerSeq is too old, server sends type:"snapshot" instead of type:"replay".

steps.label: send reconnect to trigger the error condition
